title: Nocturnal Bats
description: Lets bats come out to the surface at night.
body:
# Nocturnal Bats

Changes bat spawn rules, enabling them to spawn on the surface at night:
- Bats can now spawn at any altitude, including above ground.
- Sky-light no longer prevents bat spawn.
- Sky-light is less effective at preventing bat spawn than block-light.
- Added all common surface blocks to `#bats_spawnable_on`.

### Note
Although v1.1 is backward compatible with older version, it requires Java 21. Use [v1.0](https://modrinth.com/mod/nocturnal-bats/version/1.0.0+1.19.4) for compatibility with Java 17. Beside their compatibility range, they are functionally identical.
